narrative:
Coldwater Northeast (precinct in Mercer County) has 693 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.6 percentage points.
